examples.text: But the modern banana industry isn’t without problems. Cavendish bananas require frequent applications of pesticides that create hazards for farmworkers and ecosystems.
examples.explanation: 这里的 hazards 指“危害、风险”，强调农药的频繁使用会给农场工人和生态系统带来不利影响。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri

examples.text: That was just the home runs. Any other guesses? Any other baseball fans that want to hazard a guess? AUDIENCE: Jose Iglesias, [INAUDIBLE]. ANDY ANDRES: Good, good.
examples.explanation: 这里的 hazard a guess 是固定说法，意思是“冒昧猜一下”或“试着猜一猜”。其中 hazard 作动词，不是“危险”的名词义，而是“斗胆提出、冒险说出”的意思。说话者是在邀请观众继续猜答案。

source.text: Sabermetrics 101: Baseball Analytics | Andy Andres | Talks at Google
